description: Study of advanced risk management tools and markets for financing loss costs. Topics include: insurance, self-insurance, retrospective premium plans, risk retention and purchasing groups, reinsurance, insurance subsidiaries (captives), and other policyholder-owned facilities.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (R M I 300or graduate/professional standing) and (GEN BUS 306,704,ECON 310,STAT/​MATH  309,431, orMATH 331), and (FINANCE/​ECON  300orFINANCE 700), or declared in the Business Exchange program
